title: Typing in the search field to filter the class list
capture_instructions: Class picker panel is open. The search field contains the text 'road' (or partial text that filters results). The class list is filtered to show only matching entries — 'Roads (2)' should be visible and highlighted as the first/only result. Arrow key focus may be shown on the highlighted item.
ui_state: Class picker open, search field contains 'road', list filtered to matching classes

annotations.label: Press Enter to reclassify to Roads
